Recent Release Highlights
preview
On September 30th, 2025
Declarative Sharing - Preview
Snowflake is pleased to announce the preview of Declarative Sharing. Declarative Sharing in the Snowflake Native App Framework enables providers to share and sell data products, and to enhance those apps by including notebooks that help Snowflake consumers visualize data.
preview
On June 2nd, 2025
Snowpipe Streaming with High-Performance Architecture
Snowflake is pleased to announce the preview of the Snowpipe Streaming high-performance architecture. This next-generation implementation delivers significantly enhanced throughput and optimized streaming performance with a predictable, throughput-based pricing model.
generally available
On May 5th, 2025
Release channels for Snowflake Native Apps
generally available
On May 23rd, 2025
Search optimization: Support for Apache Iceberg™ tables
generally available
On May 23rd, 2025
Query Acceleration Service: Support for Apache Iceberg™ tables
generally available
On May 23rd, 2025
Triggered tasks: Support for streams hosted on directory tables and data shares

composio_raw.name: Snowflake
composio_raw.description: Snowflake is a cloud-based data warehouse offering elastic scaling, secure data sharing, and SQL analytics across multiple cloud environments

llm_raw.description: A cloud-based data platform that provides data storage, processing, and analytic solutions.
llm_raw.notes: Authentication schemes were inferred from established developer ecosystem knowledge; Composio metadata suggests high API utility. MCP support via community-driven projects exists.
